name: Brighthouse Financial Inc. 6.25% Junior Subordinated Debentures due 2058
summary: Brighthouse Financial Inc. 6.25% Junior Subordinated Debentures due 2058 are debt securities issued by Brighthouse Financial, representing a long-term obligation to pay interest at a fixed rate until the maturity date. These debentures are junior to other forms of debt, carrying a higher risk and potentially higher yield. Brighthouse Financial is a major provider of annuity and life insurance products.
